Deploy SGSC-AI protocol to analyze the supply chain risk and uncover the true industry role of Mudan Auto.

**SGSC-AI Intelligence Probe Executed**

Mudan Automobile Shares Company Limited is a legacy automotive manufacturer that has clearly undergone a strategic pivot. Established in 1998, its massive fully paid-in capital of 221.9 million RMB confirms its historical status as a significant vehicle manufacturer (historically famous for Mudan buses). However, a workforce of only 108 insured employees in 2024 is entirely insufficient to sustain a modern, high-volume complete vehicle assembly line (which typically requires thousands of workers). This indicates that Mudan Auto has transitioned from mass passenger vehicle production into specialized niche manufacturing. Its current operations focus on highly customized, low-volume vehicle modification (special purpose vehicles), the production of new energy vehicle components, and heavy agricultural machinery (tractors). This restructuring allows it to leverage its extensive capital and legacy manufacturing licenses without the overhead of mass automotive production.

**Risk Profile Summary:**
Trust Tier: **L1_REGISTERED** (Score: 79)
Operational Status: ACTIVE / SPECIALIZED NICHE MANUFACTURER (LEGACY RESTRUCTURING)
